title: DeepLabV3 + FCN: bisect logit-magnitude divergence (root cause investigation)
description:
Surfaced by #1139. DeepLabV3 and FCN have correct output SHAPES vs torchvision but logits are ~half-magnitude with sign flips on multiple classes. argmax agreement 67-96% across 5 test images (consistent signal, root cause unclear).

DeepLabV3 mean per class (image 397133):
- ferrotorch: [4.99, -0.69, -0.54, ..., -0.17]
- torchvision: [10.65, -1.67, -2.15, ..., 0.030]
Roughly 2x magnitude shift, sign flips on classes 5/9/11/16/19/20.

Likely candidates (per #1130 documented structural mismatches):
1. ResNet-50 backbone fc-head random fill (seed=0 used in conversion).
2. aux_classifier drop (should be inference-irrelevant; verify).
3. ASPP branch ordering / dilation mismatch.
4. Some other layer-level divergence.

Acceptance:
- Extend ferrotorch-vision/examples/inference_dump.rs with --dump-after <layer> flag to dump intermediate activations.
- Per-layer activation diff vs torchvision: identify the first divergence point.
- Fix the root cause.
- Re-run #1139 harness; both DeepLabV3 and FCN must PASS argmax-agreement ≥ 99% AND logit max-abs-diff < 1e-3.

Confidence: MED — clear signal, root cause needs bisecting.
